post.summary: ListAlerts returns all active alerts from Alertmanager resources
ListFQDNs returns all aggregated FQDNs from DNS resources
StreamFQDNs streams FQDN updates in real-time
ListMetrics returns current values of sreportal custom metrics
AddRelease appends a release entry to the day's Release CR
ListReleaseDays returns all days that have releases and the TTL window
ListReleases returns release entries paginated by day
GetVersion returns the current build version

entry.title: entry is the release entry to add

v1AddReleaseRequest.title: AddReleaseRequest is the request for adding a release entry

day.title: day is the YYYY-MM-DD of the CR the entry was added to

entryCount.title: entry_count is the total number of entries in the day's CR after the add

v1AddReleaseResponse.title: AddReleaseResponse is the response after adding a release entry

fingerprint.title: fingerprint is the unique identifier of the alert

labels.title: labels are the identifying key-value pairs

annotations.title: annotations are additional informational key-value pairs

state.title: state is the alert state (active, suppressed, unprocessed)

startsAt.title: starts_at is when the alert started firing

endsAt.title: ends_at is when the alert is expected to resolve

updatedAt.title: updated_at is the last time the alert was updated

receivers.title: receivers are the notification integrations this alert is routed to

silencedBy.title: silenced_by contains the IDs of silences that suppress this alert

v1Alert.title: Alert represents a single active alert from Alertmanager

name.title: name is the Alertmanager resource name

namespace.title: namespace is the Alertmanager resource namespace

portalRef.title: portal_ref is the portal this Alertmanager is linked to

localUrl.title: local_url is the local Alertmanager API URL used by the controller

remoteUrl.title: remote_url is the externally-reachable Alertmanager URL for dashboard links

alerts.title: alerts is the list of active alerts

lastReconcileTime.title: last_reconcile_time is when the alerts were last fetched

ready.title: ready indicates whether the last reconciliation succeeded

silences.title: silences are active silences for identifying silenced alerts

v1AlertmanagerResource.title: AlertmanagerResource represents an Alertmanager CR with its metadata and alerts

name.title: name is the fully qualified domain name

source.title: source indicates where this FQDN came from (manual or external-dns)

groups.title: groups is the list of groups this FQDN belongs to

description.title: description is an optional human-readable description

recordType.title: record_type is the DNS record type (A, AAAA, CNAME, etc.)

targets.title: targets is the list of target addresses for this FQDN

lastSeen.title: last_seen is the timestamp when this FQDN was last observed

dnsResourceName.title: dns_resource_name is the name of the DNS resource this FQDN belongs to

dnsResourceNamespace.title: dns_resource_namespace is the namespace of the DNS resource

originRef.description:
origin_ref identifies the Kubernetes resource (Service, Ingress, DNSEndpoint)
that produced this FQDN via external-dns. Not set for manual entries.

syncStatus.description:
sync_status indicates whether the FQDN is correctly resolved in DNS.
Values: "sync", "notavailable", "notsync", or empty.

v1FQDN.title: FQDN represents a fully qualified domain name with metadata

v1GetVersionRequest.title: GetVersionRequest is the request for getting the version

version.title: version is the semantic version (e.g. v1.2.3)

commit.title: commit is the git commit hash

v1GetVersionResponse.title: GetVersionResponse contains the build version information

cumulativeCount.title: cumulative_count is the number of observations in this bucket and all lower buckets

upperBound.title: upper_bound is the upper bound of this bucket

v1HistogramBucket.title: HistogramBucket represents a single histogram bucket

sampleCount.title: sample_count is the total number of observations

sampleSum.title: sample_sum is the sum of all observed values

buckets.title: buckets is the list of histogram buckets

portal.title: portal filters alerts by portal name (empty for all portals)

namespace.title: namespace filters alerts by namespace (empty for all namespaces)

search.title: search filters alerts by label value substring

state.title: state filters alerts by state (empty for all states)

v1ListAlertsRequest.title: ListAlertsRequest is the request for listing alerts

alertmanagers.title: alertmanagers is the list of Alertmanager resources with their alerts

v1ListAlertsResponse.title: ListAlertsResponse contains the list of alerts

namespace.title: namespace filters FQDNs by namespace (empty for all namespaces)

source.title: source filters FQDNs by source (empty for all sources)

search.title: search filters FQDNs by name substring

portal.title: portal filters FQDNs by portal name (empty for all portals)

pageSize.description: page_size limits the number of FQDNs returned. 0 means return all (default, backward-compatible).

pageToken.description:
page_token is an opaque cursor returned by a previous ListFQDNs call.
Empty string means start from the beginning.

v1ListFQDNsRequest.title: ListFQDNsRequest is the request for listing FQDNs

fqdns.title: fqdns is the list of aggregated FQDNs

nextPageToken.description:
next_page_token is the cursor to use in the next ListFQDNs call to retrieve the next page.
Empty when there are no more results.

totalSize.description: total_size is the total number of FQDNs matching the request filters, before pagination.

v1ListFQDNsResponse.title: ListFQDNsResponse contains the list of FQDNs

subsystem.title: subsystem filters metrics by subsystem (e.g., controller, dns, source, alertmanager, portal, http, mcp)

search.title: search filters metrics by name substring match

v1ListMetricsRequest.title: ListMetricsRequest is the request for listing metrics

families.title: families is the list of matching metric families

v1ListMetricsResponse.title: ListMetricsResponse contains the list of metric families

namespace.title: namespace filters portals by namespace (empty for all namespaces)

v1ListPortalsRequest.title: ListPortalsRequest is the request for listing portals

portals.title: portals is the list of available portals

v1ListPortalsResponse.title: ListPortalsResponse contains the list of portals

v1ListReleaseDaysRequest.title: ListReleaseDaysRequest is the request for listing all release days

days.title: days is the sorted list of YYYY-MM-DD strings that have Release CRs

ttlDays.title: ttl_days is the number of days releases are kept (derived from operator TTL config)

types.title: types is the list of configured release types with display colors

v1ListReleaseDaysResponse.title: ListReleaseDaysResponse contains the list of days with releases and TTL info

day.description: day filters to a specific day (YYYY-MM-DD). Empty returns the latest day.

pageSize.title: page_size is the max entries per response (0 = all entries for the day)

pageToken.title: page_token is the opaque cursor for pagination within a day

v1ListReleasesRequest.title: ListReleasesRequest is the request for listing releases

day.title: day is the YYYY-MM-DD of the returned entries

entries.title: entries is the list of release entries for the day

nextPageToken.title: next_page_token is the cursor for the next page within the same day

previousDay.title: previous_day is the YYYY-MM-DD of the previous day with releases (empty if none)

nextDay.title: next_day is the YYYY-MM-DD of the next day with releases (empty if none)

v1ListReleasesResponse.title: ListReleasesResponse contains the list of release entries for a day

v1Matcher.title: Matcher is a label matcher within a silence

labels.title: labels contains the label key-value pairs for this metric

value.title: value is the current metric value (gauge or counter)

histogram.title: histogram contains histogram-specific data (only for HISTOGRAM type)

v1Metric.title: Metric represents a single metric with its labels and value

name.title: name is the fully qualified metric name (e.g., sreportal_dns_fqdns_total)

type.title: type is the metric type: COUNTER, GAUGE, HISTOGRAM

metrics.title: metrics is the list of individual metric values with their labels

v1MetricFamily.title: MetricFamily represents a group of metrics sharing a name, help text, and type

kind.title: kind is the Kubernetes resource kind (e.g. Service, Ingress, DNSEndpoint)

namespace.title: namespace is the Kubernetes namespace of the origin resource

name.title: name is the name of the origin Kubernetes resource

v1OriginResourceRef.description:
OriginResourceRef identifies the Kubernetes resource that produced an FQDN.
Only populated for FQDNs discovered via external-dns sources.

name.title: name is the portal resource name

main.title: main indicates if this is the default portal

subPath.title: sub_path is the URL subpath for this portal

namespace.title: namespace is the portal resource namespace

ready.title: ready indicates if the portal is fully configured

url.title: url is the URL of a remote portal (empty for local portals)

isRemote.title: is_remote indicates if this portal fetches data from a remote source

remoteSync.title: remote_sync contains status information for remote portals

v1Portal.title: Portal represents a portal with its metadata

type.title: type is the kind of release (e.g., "deployment", "rollback", "hotfix")

version.title: version is the version string of the release

origin.title: origin identifies where the release came from (e.g., "ci/cd", "manual", service name)

date.title: date is the timestamp of the release

author.title: author is the person or system that performed the release

message.title: message is the release description or commit message

link.title: link is a URL to the release (e.g., PR, pipeline, changelog)

v1ReleaseEntry.title: ReleaseEntry represents a single release event

name.title: name is the release type identifier (e.g., "deployment", "rollback")

color.title: color is the CSS color value for UI display (e.g., "#3b82f6")

v1ReleaseTypeConfig.title: ReleaseTypeConfig describes a release type and its display color

lastSyncTime.title: last_sync_time is the timestamp of the last successful sync (RFC3339 format)

lastSyncError.title: last_sync_error contains the error from the last failed sync attempt

remoteTitle.title: remote_title is the title of the remote portal

fqdnCount.title: fqdn_count is the number of FQDNs fetched from the remote portal

v1RemoteSyncStatus.title: RemoteSyncStatus contains status information about remote portal synchronization

v1Silence.title: Silence represents a mute rule in Alertmanager

namespace.title: namespace filters updates by namespace (empty for all namespaces)

portal.title: portal filters updates by portal name (empty for all portals)

source.title: source filters updates by source (empty for all sources)

search.title: search filters updates by FQDN name substring (empty for all)

v1StreamFQDNsRequest.title: StreamFQDNsRequest is the request for streaming FQDN updates

type.title: type is the type of update

fqdn.title: fqdn is the FQDN that was updated

v1StreamFQDNsResponse.title: StreamFQDNsResponse represents an update to an FQDN

v1UpdateType.title: UpdateType represents the type of update
